'''Darin''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] with dirty-blonde [[Hair/Legends|hair]] who worked for [[House Hirskaala]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. He believed that the [[Metatheran Cartel]] was involved in illegal operations, and discovered something which he believed would sink the Cartel. Before he could compile proof and share it with anybody, he was kidnapped by a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] dressed in the security uniforms of House Hirskaala. The pirates were in league with [[Velin Wir]] of the Cartel, and they took Darin to a landing platform they were using hidden in the jungle. Darin managed to escape, and disappeared into the jungle heading generally back towards [[Gadrin]], but was never seen from again.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}} {{1st}}
